children.heading: .—Establishment and access
children.label: 1 .—Establishment and access
children.text: If, in the case of a solicitation for a contract issued by, or an award or proposed award of a contract by, the head of an agency, a protest is filed pursuant to the procedures in subchapter V of chapter 35 of title 31 and an actual or prospective offeror so requests, a file of the protest shall be established by the procuring activity and reasonable access shall be provided to actual or prospective offerors.

children.heading: .—Redacted information
children.label: 2 .—Redacted information
children.text: Information exempt from disclosure under may be redacted in a file established pursuant to paragraph (1) unless an applicable protective order provides otherwise.section 552 of title 5
may take any action set out in subparagraphs (A) through (F) of subsection (b)(1) of ; andsection 3554 of title 31
may pay costs described in paragraph (1) of within the limits referred to in paragraph (2) of such section.section 3554(c) of title 31
